name: every rule carries an introduced_in epoch tag so consumers can grandfather pre-epoch state
command: GCS="$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/generated-code-quality-standards" ruby -ryaml -e 'n=0;bad=0;Dir[ENV["GCS"]+"/*/*.yaml"].each{|f|d=YAML.unsafe_load_file(f) rescue next;next unless d.is_a?(Hash);(d["rules"]||[]).each{|r|next unless r.is_a?(Hash)&&r["id"];n+=1;bad+=1 if r["introduced_in"].to_s.empty?}};STDERR.puts(bad.zero? ? "all-epoch-tagged n=#{n}":"untagged=#{bad}");exit(bad.zero? ? 0 : 1)'
